notes: The HTTP adapter is the generic webhook/REST pattern. In OpenFn, the workflow itself is the webhook endpoint — no per-vendor subscription. The 'Retrieve Poll' equivalent is a cron schedule that calls request().

triggers.name: Catch Hook
triggers.description: Fires when a POST, PUT, or GET request is made to the OpenFn webhook URL. Request body is parsed (JSON/form).

triggers.name: Catch Raw Hook
triggers.description: Fires when a POST, PUT, or GET request is made to the OpenFn webhook URL. Body is delivered unparsed.

triggers.name: Retrieve Poll
triggers.description: Fires when a request to a configured URL returns new entries.

output.summary: Response body from the polled URL
